requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling — SLSEA Energy Label for Lamps
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——SLSEA 灯具能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——SLSEA 燈具能效標籤

summary.en: Sri Lanka operates a national energy-efficiency labelling programme administered by the Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority (SLSEA) under the Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority Act. Lighting products, including LED lamps within the programme scope, are required to carry the Sri Lankan energy-efficiency label and to be registered with SLSEA before being placed on the market. The label communicates the product energy-performance rating to consumers using a star-rating style scheme based on luminous efficacy (lm/W) and related performance. Importers must verify the current programme scope and the applicable label format with SLSEA, since the list of regulated lighting categories and the rating thresholds are set and updated by the Authority. This is distinct from SLSI safety certification and is an additional, separate obligation.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡依据《斯里兰卡可持续能源局法》设有全国性能效标签计划，由斯里兰卡可持续能源局（SLSEA）管理。计划范围内的照明产品（包括 LED 灯）须加贴斯里兰卡能效标签，并在投放市场前向 SLSEA 注册。该标签以基于光效（lm/W）及相关性能的星级评定方式向消费者传达产品能效等级。进口商须向 SLSEA 核实现行计划范围及适用标签格式，因为受管制照明类别清单及评级阈值由该局制定并更新。此项与 SLSI 安全认证不同，是额外且独立的义务。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡依據《斯里蘭卡可持續能源局法》設有全國性能效標籤計劃，由斯里蘭卡可持續能源局（SLSEA）管理。計劃範圍內的照明產品（包括 LED 燈）須加貼斯里蘭卡能效標籤，並在投放市場前向 SLSEA 注冊。該標籤以基於光效（lm/W）及相關性能的星級評定方式向消費者傳達產品能效等級。進口商須向 SLSEA 核實現行計劃範圍及適用標籤格式，因為受管制照明類別清單及評級閾值由該局制定並更新。此項與 SLSI 安全認證不同，是額外且獨立的義務。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority (SLSEA) energy-efficiency labelling programme for lighting products
Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority Act, No. 35 of 2007 (enabling legislation for energy labelling)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires / LED light sources), which defines energy-efficiency grades by luminous efficacy: Grade 1 (highest), Grade 2, and Grade 3 (the market-entry minimum). The China Energy Label (CEL) is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is registered with SAMR-authorised bodies such as CQC / CECP. The CEL grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds defined in GB 30255.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品/LED 光源能效限定值及能效等级），按光效划分能效等级：1 级（最高）、2 级、3 级（市场准入最低值）。中国能效标识（CEL）对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，须向 CQC / CECP 等市场监管总局（SAMR）授权机构注册。CEL 等级基于 GB 30255 规定的绝对 lm/W 阈值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品/LED 光源能效限定值及能效等級），按光效劃分能效等級：1 級（最高）、2 級、3 級（市場准入最低值）。中國能效標識（CEL）對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，須向 CQC / CECP 等市場監管總局（SAMR）授權機構注冊。CEL 等級基於 GB 30255 規定的絕對 lm/W 閾值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED light sources / LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR / CQC / CECP

gap.en: Both Sri Lanka and China operate mandatory energy labelling for in-scope lamps, but the schemes are separate and non-mutual: a product registered for the China Energy Label is not automatically recognised under the SLSEA programme, and vice versa. The SLSEA label uses a Sri Lankan rating format (commonly a star rating) and requires registration with SLSEA before market placement, while the China CEL uses GB 30255 grades and CQC / CECP registration. A Chinese manufacturer must register separately with SLSEA, apply the Sri Lankan label artwork, and confirm the current SLSEA scope and threshold values for the specific lamp type — a product's China CEL grade does not determine its SLSEA rating. Importers should confirm with SLSEA whether the specific LED lamp/luminaire category is currently in the regulated scope.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡与中国均对范围内灯具实施强制性能效标签，但两套方案相互独立、不存在互认：取得中国能效标识注册的产品不自动获得 SLSEA 计划认可，反之亦然。SLSEA 标签采用斯里兰卡评级格式（通常为星级），并要求在投放市场前向 SLSEA 注册；中国 CEL 采用 GB 30255 等级及 CQC / CECP 注册。中国制造商须另行向 SLSEA 注册、加贴斯里兰卡标签图样，并就具体灯型核实现行 SLSEA 范围及阈值——产品的中国 CEL 等级不能决定其 SLSEA 评级。进口商应向 SLSEA 确认具体 LED 灯/灯具类别当前是否在受管制范围内。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡與中國均對範圍內燈具實施強制性能效標籤，但兩套方案相互獨立、不存在互認：取得中國能效標識注冊的產品不自動獲得 SLSEA 計劃認可，反之亦然。SLSEA 標籤採用斯里蘭卡評級格式（通常為星級），並要求在投放市場前向 SLSEA 注冊；中國 CEL 採用 GB 30255 等級及 CQC / CECP 注冊。中國製造商須另行向 SLSEA 注冊、加貼斯里蘭卡標籤圖樣，並就具體燈型核實現行 SLSEA 範圍及閾值——產品的中國 CEL 等級不能決定其 SLSEA 評級。進口商應向 SLSEA 確認具體 LED 燈/燈具類別當前是否在受管制範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope lamps — SLSEA energy-efficiency label and registration required before market placement for lighting categories within the SLSEA programme scope; confirm current scope and thresholds with SLSEA for the specific product type
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC / CECP required before affixing the CEL under GB 30255-2019

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka operates an SLSEA energy-efficiency labelling programme for in-scope lamps, requiring registration and a Sri Lankan energy label before market placement. This is separate from China's GB 30255 / China Energy Label scheme and there is no mutual recognition. A Chinese manufacturer must register the product with SLSEA, apply the Sri Lankan label, and confirm the current programme scope and rating thresholds for the specific LED lamp type with SLSEA before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡对范围内灯具实施 SLSEA 能效标签计划，要求在投放市场前注册并加贴斯里兰卡能效标签。此项与中国 GB 30255 / 中国能效标识方案相互独立，且无互认。中国制造商须就具体 LED 灯型向 SLSEA 注册产品、加贴斯里兰卡标签，并在出口前向 SLSEA 确认现行计划范围及评级阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡對範圍內燈具實施 SLSEA 能效標籤計劃，要求在投放市場前注冊並加貼斯里蘭卡能效標籤。此項與中國 GB 30255 / 中國能效標識方案相互獨立，且無互認。中國製造商須就具體 LED 燈型向 SLSEA 注冊產品、加貼斯里蘭卡標籤，並在出口前向 SLSEA 確認現行計劃範圍及評級閾值。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum Performance (Efficacy / Lifetime / Power Factor) — IEC Performance Basis vs GB 30255
requirement_topic.zh: 最低性能（能效/寿命/功率因数）——IEC 性能基础 vs GB 30255
requirement_topic.zht: 最低性能（能效/壽命/功率因數）——IEC 性能基礎 vs GB 30255

summary.en: Unlike the EU, Sri Lanka does not impose an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation that mandates a single set of minimum efficacy, colour-rendering, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds as a market-entry barrier. Instead, performance is addressed through two routes: (1) the SLSEA energy-labelling programme, where higher efficacy yields a better star rating but a low rating does not necessarily bar market entry unless a minimum performance level is set for that category; and (2) performance requirements within the adopted SLS / IEC product standards used in SLSI certification (e.g., the performance provisions of IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps). Manufacturers should confirm with SLSI and SLSEA whether a binding minimum efficacy or performance floor currently applies to the specific lamp category, as these are set by the Sri Lankan authorities rather than by a single horizontal regulation.
summary.zh: 与欧盟不同，斯里兰卡未实施欧盟式的横向生态设计法规，即不以单一套最低能效、显色、寿命及功率因数阈值作为市场准入门槛。性能通过两条路径处理：（1）SLSEA 能效标签计划，能效越高星级越好，但低评级未必阻止市场准入，除非该类别设有最低性能水平；（2）SLSI 认证所采用的 SLS / IEC 产品标准中的性能要求（如自镇流 LED 灯 IEC 62560 的性能条款）。制造商应向 SLSI 及 SLSEA 确认具体灯型当前是否适用具约束力的最低能效或性能下限，因为这些由斯里兰卡主管机构设定，而非由单一横向法规规定。
summary.zht: 與歐盟不同，斯里蘭卡未實施歐盟式的橫向生態設計法規，即不以單一套最低能效、顯色、壽命及功率因數閾值作為市場准入門檻。性能通過兩條路徑處理：（1）SLSEA 能效標籤計劃，能效越高星級越好，但低評級未必阻止市場准入，除非該類別設有最低性能水平；（2）SLSI 認證所採用的 SLS / IEC 產品標準中的性能要求（如自鎮流 LED 燈 IEC 62560 的性能條款）。製造商應向 SLSI 及 SLSEA 確認具體燈型當前是否適用具約束力的最低能效或性能下限，因為這些由斯里蘭卡主管機構設定，而非由單一橫向法規規定。

standards_or_laws: SLSEA energy-efficiency labelling programme (efficacy-based rating for lighting)
SLS standards adopting IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps — performance and safety) as referenced in SLSI certification

summary.en: China's GB 30255-2019 sets energy-efficiency grades by luminous efficacy and Grade 3 is the minimum for market entry. China's performance and safety requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps are addressed in GB / GB-T standards aligned with the IEC base series, and the China Energy Label communicates the efficacy grade. GB 30255 focuses on efficacy grading; power factor, CRI minimums, and lifetime are addressed across related GB / GB-T standards rather than as a single binding horizontal performance floor.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 30255-2019 按光效划分能效等级，3 级为市场准入最低值。中国自镇流 LED 灯的性能及安全要求由对齐 IEC 基础系列的 GB / GB-T 标准规定，中国能效标识传达能效等级。GB 30255 侧重能效分级；功率因数、最低显色指数及寿命由相关 GB / GB-T 标准分别规定，而非单一具约束力的横向性能下限。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 30255-2019 按光效劃分能效等級，3 級為市場准入最低值。中國自鎮流 LED 燈的性能及安全要求由對齊 IEC 基礎系列的 GB / GB-T 標準規定，中國能效標識傳達能效等級。GB 30255 側重能效分級；功率因數、最低顯色指數及壽命由相關 GB / GB-T 標準分別規定，而非單一具約束力的橫向性能下限。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency grades for LED light sources / LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: The key structural difference: China uses GB 30255 efficacy grades (Grade 3 as the binding market-entry floor) plus the China Energy Label, whereas Sri Lanka relies on the SLSEA star-rating label combined with the performance provisions inside the adopted SLS / IEC product standards used by SLSI — it does not operate a single EU-style Ecodesign performance barrier. Practical consequence for a Chinese exporter: a product meeting GB 30255 Grade 2 or Grade 3 is not automatically rated or accepted under SLSEA; the manufacturer must (1) register and obtain the SLSEA rating, and (2) meet the performance and safety clauses of the SLS / IEC standard cited in the SLSI certificate. Confirm with SLSI and SLSEA whether any binding minimum efficacy currently gates the specific lamp category, since thresholds and scope are set by the Sri Lankan authorities.
gap.zh: 关键结构差异：中国采用 GB 30255 能效等级（3 级为具约束力的市场准入下限）加中国能效标识，而斯里兰卡依靠 SLSEA 星级标签结合 SLSI 所采用 SLS / IEC 产品标准内的性能条款——并不实施单一欧盟式生态设计性能门槛。对中国出口商的实际影响：满足 GB 30255 2 级或 3 级的产品不自动获得 SLSEA 评级或认可；制造商须（1）注册并取得 SLSEA 评级，（2）满足 SLSI 证书所引用 SLS / IEC 标准的性能及安全条款。请向 SLSI 及 SLSEA 确认具体灯型当前是否设有具约束力的最低能效门槛，因为阈值及范围由斯里兰卡主管机构设定。
gap.zht: 關鍵結構差異：中國採用 GB 30255 能效等級（3 級為具約束力的市場准入下限）加中國能效標識，而斯里蘭卡依靠 SLSEA 星級標籤結合 SLSI 所採用 SLS / IEC 產品標準內的性能條款——並不實施單一歐盟式生態設計性能門檻。對中國出口商的實際影響：滿足 GB 30255 2 級或 3 級的產品不自動獲得 SLSEA 評級或認可；製造商須（1）注冊並取得 SLSEA 評級，（2）滿足 SLSI 證書所引用 SLS / IEC 標準的性能及安全條款。請向 SLSI 及 SLSEA 確認具體燈型當前是否設有具約束力的最低能效門檻，因為閾值及範圍由斯里蘭卡主管機構設定。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal Ecodesign efficacy barrier; performance is addressed via the SLSEA label rating and the performance clauses of the adopted SLS / IEC product standard in SLSI certification. Confirm with SLSI / SLSEA whether a binding minimum applies to the specific category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka does not apply an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign minimum-performance barrier. Lamp performance is handled through the SLSEA energy-label rating and the performance provisions of the adopted SLS / IEC product standard used in SLSI certification, not a single binding efficacy floor. A China GB 30255 grade does not transfer to Sri Lanka. Chinese manufacturers should confirm the current SLSEA rating method and any category-specific minimum performance with SLSEA and SLSI for the specific lamp type before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡不实施欧盟式横向生态设计最低性能门槛。灯具性能通过 SLSEA 能效标签评级及 SLSI 认证所采用 SLS / IEC 产品标准的性能条款处理，而非单一具约束力的能效下限。中国 GB 30255 等级不可转移至斯里兰卡。中国制造商应就具体灯型向 SLSEA 及 SLSI 确认现行 SLSEA 评级方法及任何类别特定最低性能后再出口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡不實施歐盟式橫向生態設計最低性能門檻。燈具性能通過 SLSEA 能效標籤評級及 SLSI 認證所採用 SLS / IEC 產品標準的性能條款處理，而非單一具約束力的能效下限。中國 GB 30255 等級不可轉移至斯里蘭卡。中國製造商應就具體燈型向 SLSEA 及 SLSI 確認現行 SLSEA 評級方法及任何類別特定最低性能後再出口。
